tasks.instruction: Read the text below. Fill in each gap (1.1-1.6) with one word to make the text correct.
tasks.text: Our class is planning a school party next Friday. We 1.1. _________ buy decorations and snacks before Thursday. If the weather 1.2. _________ nice, we will have the party in the garden. Tom 1.3. _________ play the guitar because he is really good at it. Our teacher said we 1.4. _________ invite students from other classes too. If we 1.5. _________ sell enough tickets, we won't have money for the DJ. Everyone is excited 1.6. _________ the party. It will be great!
